name: pm-skills-marketplace
description: Product Management skills for AI agents

plugins.name: pm-skills
plugins.description: 59 PM skills (26 phase + 8 foundation + 10 utility + 15 tool) plus 4 sub-agents (pm-critic, pm-skill-auditor, pm-changelog-curator, pm-release-conductor) covering the full product lifecycle. v2.16.0 ships Active Orchestration as the first runtime-component layer alongside the content library: 4 plugin sub-agents codify the Phase 0 Adversarial Review Loop + 6-gate release runbook; 4 dispatch skills at skills/utility-pm-{role}/ extend cross-client compatibility to Codex CLI, Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot, and Gemini CLI (VALIDATED on Codex CLI 2026-05-17). Doc-stack runs on Astro 6.3.x + Starlight 0.39.x. Carries forward v2.15.0 Sprint Skills (Foundation Sprint family of 7 + Design Sprint family of 7 + tool-note-and-vote standalone implementing Knapp/Zeratsky/Kowitz canonical sprint methodologies under classification:tool taxonomy), v2.12.0 OKR Skills set, v2.11.0 Meeting Skills Family, lean canvas, persona, 12 workflows including the foundation-to-design end-to-end arc, thread-aligned samples (Brainshelf + Storevine + Workbench), and lifecycle tools for creating, validating, and iterating skills. Follows the agentskills.io specification.
